hero.title: Paratrooper Blitz
hero.subtitle: Classic arcade action
hero.description: Arcade-style mobile game: destroy aircraft and paratroopers before they land. Two control modes (Arcade and Classic DOS), scoring, career ranks, optional ads and in-app purchases, and Google Play Games / Game Center integrations on supported builds.
hero.structuredDataDescription: Paratrooper Blitz — retro anti-air arcade for iOS and Android. Arcade slide-and-shoot and Classic aim-and-fire modes, leaderboards, 14 achievements, 12 languages. Android com.zuki.apps.paratrooperblitz by Zuki Apps.

modes.title: Two ways to play
modes.description: Pick the control scheme that fits you — fast arcade movement or classic rotation aiming.
items: Arcade mode: move the turret left and right
Classic DOS mode: rotate and aim

action.title: Scores & career rank
action.description: Chase high scores and progress through themed military-style ranks as you play.
items: Session scoring with aircraft and paratrooper hits

social.title: Leaderboards & achievements
social.description: Where signed in, use platform services for rankings and achievements as configured in the app.
items: Global and friends-style lists where available
Firebase Analytics/Crashlytics may apply for stability

status.title: Availability
status.description: iOS and Android. Android application ID: com.zuki.apps.paratrooperblitz. Store links appear when listings are public.

download.title: Download
download.description: App Store and Google Play badges will appear here when the app is published.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before using Paratrooper Blitz. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the game.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms govern your access to and use of Paratrooper Blitz ("Service", "Game"), operated by Zuki Apps. By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Service, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
section1.content2: If you use the Service on behalf of a minor, you represent that you are the parent or guardian authorized to agree on their behalf where required.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: Paratrooper Blitz is an arcade-style action game. The Service includes:
items: Gameplay sessions, scoring, and progression features
Optional integration with platform game services (e.g. leaderboards, achievements) where available
Advertising and in-app purchases as described in-app
Audio and visual effects; online features depend on third-party services and connectivity

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: The game may use Firebase Analytics and Crashlytics for diagnostics, platform sign-in for game services, and advertising identifiers subject to your device settings. Gameplay data may be processed by platform providers (Apple, Google) when you use their services.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use collected information to operate the game, show ads or offers where applicable, improve stability, and comply with law. Leaderboards and achievements rely on platform APIs when you opt in or sign in.

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell your personal information. Third parties (ad networks, analytics, platform game services) may process data under their policies when those features are active.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.content: We implement reasonable safeguards appropriate to a mobile game. Use strong device security and keep the app updated.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, delete, or restrict certain processing. Platform account settings and OS privacy controls apply. Contact us for requests we can fulfill directly.

privacy.metaDescription: Datenschutzrichtlinie für Paratrooper Blitz – Arcade-Spiel. Wie mit Spieldaten, Anzeigen, Firebase und Plattformspieldiensten umgegangen wird.

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: Real app screens from Paratrooper Blitz.

items.title: Main menu
items.description: Pick Arcade or Classic and view your best scores.

items.title: Classic mode
items.description: Aim-and-fire paratrooper action with scoring on screen.

items.title: Arcade mode
items.description: Slide-and-shoot waves of aircraft and chutes.

items.title: Chute shots
items.description: Time your shots before paratroopers land.

items.title: Wave pressure
items.description: Survive escalating waves for a high score.

steps.title: Pick a mode
steps.description: Arcade for slide-and-shoot; Classic for aim-and-fire.

steps.title: Destroy threats
steps.description: Shoot aircraft and paratroopers before they reach your turret.

steps.title: Chain combos
steps.description: Keep accuracy high to maximize score multipliers.

steps.title: Beat your best
steps.description: Submit scores to leaderboards and unlock achievements.

items.title: Beginner
items.description: 1. Learn Arcade first — fixed vertical shots are easier to aim. 2. Watch the ground — two soldiers on one side triggers a danger alert; four ends the run. 3. Pop chutes early — +150 points and they fall fast without a canopy.

items.title: Intermediate
items.description: 4. Center your turret in Arcade so you can reach both sides quickly. 5. Save fire for clusters — combo windows reward back-to-back kills. 6. Deal with bombers first — destroy the plane or the bomb before it lands.

items.title: Advanced
items.description: 7. Classic mode — sweep the sky in arcs; lead aircraft moving horizontally. 8. Wave spikes — after ~2 minutes, spawn rate increases; stay calm and prioritize landings. 9. Sign in once from home → Global Rankings so game-over scores upload.

items.title: Career & achievements
items.description: Rank up on the home screen from lifetime stats. - Check the trophy catalog for 14 achievements (score milestones, career totals, session goals).

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about features, privacy, and billing.

items.question: Is Paratrooper Blitz free?
items.answer: Yes. The game is free to download and play. Optional one-time Remove Ads purchase removes banner and interstitial ads.

items.question: What age is the game for?
items.answer: Rated Teen (13+). Mild military-style arcade action—no gore, no chat, no user-generated content.

items.question: Does it work offline?
items.answer: Core gameplay works offline. Leaderboards, achievements, ads, and purchases need network and store services.

items.question: Which languages are supported?
items.answer: English, Arabic, German, Spanish, French, Hebrew, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, Russian, and Chinese (Simplified). Change in Settings.

items.question: What’s the difference between Arcade and Classic?
items.answer: Arcade: slide left/right, shoot up. Classic: rotate turret 360° and aim manually.

items.question: How do I lose?
items.answer: Four parachutists land on the **same side** of your turret, or a bomb hits the ground.

items.question: Why did my score go down when I fired?
items.answer: Each shot costs 1 point (classic Paratrooper rule).

items.question: Do paratroopers ever land off-screen?
items.answer: No—drops stay within the play area.

items.question: Why didn’t my score appear on the leaderboard?
items.answer: You must sign in to Google Play Games (Android) or Game Center (iOS). Open **Global Rankings** from the home menu once to complete sign-in, then play a full round.

items.question: Are Arcade and Classic scores separate?
items.answer: Yes—each mode has its own leaderboard.

items.question: How many achievements are there?
items.answer: 14 trophies with an in-app catalog showing requirements.

items.question: What does Remove Ads include?
items.answer: Removes the home banner and post-game interstitial. One-time non-consumable purchase.

support.title: Support & Hilfe
support.subtitle: Wir sind hier, um zu helfen! Finden Sie Antworten auf häufige Fragen oder kontaktieren Sie Zuki Apps zum Thema Paratrooper Blitz.

privacy.title: Datenschutzrichtlinie
privacy.description: Erfahren Sie, wie wir Ihre Daten schützen

q1.question: Ist Paratrooper Blitz kostenlos?
q1.answer: Ja. Das Spiel kann kostenlos heruntergeladen und gespielt werden. Durch den optionalen einmaligen Kauf von „Remove Ads“ werden Banner- und Interstitial-Anzeigen entfernt.

q2.question: Für welches Alter ist das Spiel geeignet?
q2.answer: Bewertet als Teenager (13+). Leichte Arcade-Action im Militärstil – kein Blut, kein Chat, keine benutzergenerierten Inhalte.

q3.question: Funktioniert es offline?
q3.answer: Das Kern-Gameplay funktioniert offline. Bestenlisten, Erfolge, Anzeigen und Käufe erfordern Netzwerk- und Store-Dienste.

q4.question: Welche Sprachen werden unterstützt?
q4.answer: Englisch, Arabisch, Deutsch, Spanisch, Französisch, Hebräisch, Italienisch, Japanisch, Koreanisch, Portugiesisch, Russisch und Chinesisch (vereinfacht). Änderung in den Einstellungen.

q5.question: Was ist der Unterschied zwischen Arcade und Classic?
q5.answer: Arcade: nach links/rechts schieben, hochschießen. Klassisch: Turm um 360° drehen und manuell zielen.

q6.question: Wie verliere ich?
q6.answer: Vier Fallschirmspringer landen auf derselben Seite Ihres Turms, oder eine Bombe schlägt auf dem Boden ein.

additionalHelp.title: Benötigen Sie weitere Hilfe?
additionalHelp.description: Wenn Sie die gesuchte Antwort nicht finden konnten oder ein technisches Problem auftritt, zögern Sie bitte nicht, uns zu kontaktieren. Wir sind für Sie da und antworten in der Regel innerhalb von 24–48 Stunden.
